metric: Cumulative Trans-Iranian Railway cost through FY1938-39
source: Wikipedia, 'Trans-Iranian Railway' (citing Mikiya Koyagi's research on the railway), directly fetched and confirmed
notes: This is TOTAL PROJECT COST, not tax revenue itself. Per the same source: 'the majority of capital used to fund the railway was provided through taxes on goods such as sugar and tea' -- i.e. this figure is the cumulative fiscal burden that the 1925 sugar/tea excise (see Encyclopaedia Iranica FISCAL SYSTEM v. PAHLAVI PERIOD, already in data/raw/pahlavi-era-primary-extraction/iranica-fiscal-system-narrative-series-1921-1979/) was substantially, but not exclusively, financing. No year-by-year or commodity-specific (sugar-only vs. tea-only) breakdown of the revenue side was found in freely accessible sources.
currency_conversion_note: computed via IRN official/parallel FX rate + CPI, base year 2015 (FX_1939=18.37, rebased CPI_1939=0.0043)
